name: Scotch Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the brown sugar, lard, butter, and flour in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Add a pinch of nutmeg and mix thoroughly.
3. Shape the dough into a flat disk and wrap it in plastic wrap.
4. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to firm up the dough.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Remove from refrigerator and roll out on a floured surface until about 1/8 inch thick.
7. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
8. Place cookies on an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
10. Allow to cool completely before removing from the pan.
